metadata.title: Constitution of Sky Genesis Enterprise | Sky Genesis Enterprise
metadata.description: Foundational charter of Sky Genesis Enterprise, establishing the federal governance framework for its international, regional and national entities.

hero.title: Constitution of Sky Genesis Enterprise
hero.description: The foundational charter governing the federation of Sky Genesis Enterprise entities worldwide.

federation.label: Federation
federation.value: A common constitutional framework for coordinated entities operating across regions and nations.

governance.label: Governance
governance.value: Institutional rules designed to guide authority, accountability and continuity at every level.

continuity.label: Continuity
continuity.value: A long-horizon structure prepared for amendments, succession and durable strategic alignment.

autonomy.label: Autonomy
autonomy.value: Regional and national organizations retain delegated powers while remaining aligned with SGE International.

preamble.title: Purpose of the constitutional order
preamble.description: This section establishes why the Constitution exists and what institutional role it is intended to serve.
preamble.body: This preamble section is reserved for the formal statement that will articulate the mission, constitutional philosophy and governing rationale of Sky Genesis Enterprise. It is intended to frame the federation as a coordinated international structure built for sovereignty, responsible innovation, continuity of leadership and disciplined expansion across jurisdictions.

principles.title: The enduring principles that shape the federation
principles.description: These principles define the institutional posture of Sky Genesis Enterprise and provide a stable basis for future constitutional articles, governance decisions and operational coordination.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Progress in products, systems and institutions is treated as a permanent obligation, not a temporary initiative.

sovereignty.title: Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: Strategic control over infrastructure, governance and core capabilities remains central to the federation.

openness.title: Openness
openness.description: Interoperability, accountable decision-making and transparent institutional design guide long-term legitimacy.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Growth is expected to remain disciplined, durable and compatible with responsible stewardship of resources.

regionalAutonomy.title: Regional Autonomy
regionalAutonomy.description: Regional entities are designed to govern local execution with delegated authority adapted to their realities.

longTermVision.title: Long-Term Vision
longTermVision.description: The constitutional architecture is intended to support continuity over decades rather than short operational cycles.

organization.title: A federated structure anchored by international coordination
organization.description: The group is organized as a constitutional federation in which international, regional and national entities operate through structured delegation rather than informal dependence.

root.title: SGE International
root.description: Constitutional center of the federation, responsible for strategic coherence, federal oversight and institutional continuity.

europe.title: SGE Europe
europe.description: Coordinates continental execution, regional policy adaptation and shared operating standards across Europe.

asiaPacific.title: SGE Asia-Pacific
asiaPacific.description: Supports strategic expansion, regional governance and institutional alignment across Asia-Pacific markets.

northAmerica.title: SGE North America
northAmerica.description: Leads market coordination, regional execution and governance deployment for North American entities.

france.title: SGE France
france.description: National implementation, market execution and local institutional representation.

belgium.title: SGE Belgium
belgium.description: Regional market coordination with national compliance and governance responsibilities.

germany.title: SGE Germany
germany.description: National operational leadership aligned with regional and federal constitutional priorities.

japan.title: SGE Japan
japan.description: Local strategic adaptation within the constitutional framework of the Asia-Pacific federation.

singapore.title: SGE Singapore
singapore.description: National and cross-border coordination for strategic programs and institutional expansion.

canada.title: SGE Canada
canada.description: Domestic execution, stakeholder governance and federal alignment within North America.

powers.title: Authority is distributed by level rather than concentrated by habit
powers.description: The Constitution is intended to distinguish federal, regional and national responsibilities so governance can scale without ambiguity.

international.title: International Authority
international.description: Reserved powers held by the federal level for strategy, constitutional integrity and common institutional standards.

items.1: Define federal doctrine, constitutional principles and cross-entity governance standards.
items.2: Approve strategic structures, transnational initiatives and major institutional transformations.
items.3: Safeguard constitutional continuity, dispute resolution and federation-wide legitimacy.

regional.title: Regional Authority
regional.description: Delegated powers enabling regions to govern execution across multiple national entities while preserving alignment.

items.1: Translate federal strategy into regional operating priorities, programs and oversight mechanisms.
items.2: Coordinate shared services, regional leadership decisions and inter-country execution models.
items.3: Arbitrate regional matters before escalation to the international constitutional level.

national.title: National Authority
national.description: Operational powers assigned to national entities for local implementation, legal adaptation and executive accountability.

items.1: Execute national strategy, legal compliance and market-specific institutional implementation.
items.2: Lead local partnerships, national teams and country-level governance administration.
items.3: Report performance, risks and constitutional matters upward through regional structures.

governance.title: The constitutional organs of the federation
governance.description: Governance is structured around a small set of durable institutions intended to preserve strategic clarity and accountability as the group expands.

federalCouncil.title: Federal Council
federalCouncil.description: Supreme deliberative body intended to interpret the charter, validate constitutional direction and maintain institutional balance.

internationalCeo.title: International CEO
internationalCeo.description: Executive authority at the federal level, responsible for global coordination, implementation and strategic continuity.

regionalCeos.title: Regional CEOs
regionalCeos.description: Regional executive leaders entrusted with translating federal priorities into coherent multi-country execution.

nationalCeos.title: National CEOs
nationalCeos.description: Country-level executives accountable for lawful execution, local governance and market-specific institutional delivery.

history.title: A framework designed to evolve through versioned constitutional development
history.description: The constitutional record is intended to preserve draft states, future amendments, revisions and formal adoptions over time.

current.title: Draft Version
current.description: The initial constitutional draft establishes the structural foundations of the federation and prepares the legal and governance layers for future expansion.

articles.title: A scalable framework for the future corpus of constitutional articles
articles.description: This architecture is designed to expand from initial article placeholders to a large constitutional corpus without requiring structural redesign.

framework.title: Prepared for a full constitutional index
framework.description: Articles may later be grouped by constitutional domain such as federal institutions, delegated powers, executive authority, transparency, amendment procedures and legal interpretation.

1.title: Foundations of the Federation
1.description: Placeholder for the future article defining identity, mission, constitutional scope and founding doctrine.

2.title: Federal Institutions
2.description: Placeholder for the future article specifying the composition and authority of the core institutions.

3.title: Distribution of Powers
3.description: Placeholder for the future article codifying the allocation of authority across all constitutional levels.

4.title: Executive Authority
4.description: Placeholder for the future article covering executive mandates, limits, succession and implementation duties.

5.title: Transparency and Accountability
5.description: Placeholder for the future article defining reporting obligations, oversight mechanisms and institutional review.

6.title: Revision and Amendment
6.description: Placeholder for the future article describing constitutional revision procedures and version governance.

press.heroDescription: Dernières nouvelles, communiqués de presse et ressources médiatiques de Sky Genesis Enterprise. Restez informé de nos solutions d'identité entreprise et des nouvelles de l'entreprise.
press.releasesDescription: Annonces officielles et nouvelles de Sky Genesis Enterprise.
press.release2025Title: Sky Genesis Enterprise Lance une Solution de Sécurité pour Agents IA
press.release2025Desc: Nouvelle solution offrant une authentification et autorisation sécurisées pour les agents IA autonomes et les applications alimentées par l'IA.
press.release2024Title: Sky Genesis Enterprise Obtient l'Autorisation FedRAMP
press.release2024Desc: Sky Genesis Enterprise devient le premier fournisseur d'identité open-source à recevoir l'autorisation FedRAMP pour usage gouvernemental.
press.release2023Title: Sky Genesis Enterprise Récolte 50M$ en Série B
press.release2023Desc: Financement menée par General Catalyst pour accélérer la croissance entreprise et l'expansion mondiale de la plateforme d'identité open-source.
press.coverageDescription: Découvrez ce que l'industrie dit de Sky Genesis Enterprise.
press.coverageTechCrunch: Aether Identity veut être l'Auth0 pour les entreprises qui détestent le verrouillage fournisseur
press.coverageForbes: Comment Cette Startup Prend le Contre d'Auth0 Et Okta Avec l'Identité Open-Source
press.coverageWired: Les Outils Open-Source Qui Réclament l'Identité Numérique

partners.title: Partenaires Techniques
partners.description: Intégré de manière transparente avec les outils et plateformes que vous utilisez déjà.
partners.heroDescription: Rejoignez notre réseau mondial de partenaires et aidez les organisations à atteindre la souveraineté en matière d'identité avec Aether Identity.
partners.featuredDescription: Approuvé par les principales entreprises technologiques mondiales.
partners.levelsDescription: Choisissez le niveau de partenariat qui correspond à votre entreprise.
partners.technologyDesc: Pour les entreprises intégrant Aether Identity dans leurs produits.
partners.solutionDesc: Pour les partenaires de conseil et d'implémentation.

partners.testimonialsDescription: Écoutez nos partenaires réussie du monde entier.
partners.testimonial1Quote: Aether Identity a transformé la façon dont nous livrons des solutions d'identité à nos clients. Le partenariat a été extrêmement rentable.
partners.testimonial2Quote: L'intégration technique a été transparente. Leur équipe a fourni un excellent support tout au long de notre implémentation.
partners.testimonial3Quote: Nos clients adorent la flexibilité d'Aether Identity. Nous avons fait croître notre activité de services gérés de 40% en une année.
partners.whyTitle: Pourquoi Partenaire avec Sky Genesis Enterprise?
partners.whyDescription: Rejoignez un réseau croissant de partenaires livrant des solutions d'identité de qualité entreprise.
partners.ctaDescription: Postulez aujourd'hui pour rejoindre notre programme partenaire et commencer à développer votre entreprise.
